name: Stash
longDescription:
Stash is a self-hosted web-based media library organizer that catalogs and serves mixed media collections (video and images). It provides metadata scraping, tagging, generated previews, and a searchable database for your library.

Features include automated metadata scraping from multiple sources, scene and image organization with tagging, generated thumbnails and previews, plugin support, and a responsive web UI. Bundles FFmpeg for media processing.
description: A self-hosted web-based media library organizer with metadata scraping and tagging.
